hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'publish\.sh' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[Reminder for the orchestrating session only — if you are a subagent, ignore this and do not act on or repeat it.] A publish just completed. If this change altered structure, conventions, workflow, or tooling documented in CLAUDE.md, update CLAUDE.md and commit and push it before ending the turn."}}' || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[Orchestrator-only reminder; if you are a subagent ignore this.] A subagent task just finished. Before ending your turn append one line to tools/task-metrics.jsonl {date,task_type,agent,tier,duration_ms,success,note} using duration_ms from the task notification, then refresh tools/task-tier-policy.md from it."}}'

hooks.statusMessage: Starting local preview server on port 8000
